sqlReaderQuery.value:
select '@{pipeline().parameters.p_pl_projectid}' as project_id, 
isnull((select Activity from PM_Activity where ID = ActivityID),'') Activity_Code,
isnull((select code from SP_ScheduleResource where ID = ScheduleResourceID),'')   ScheduleResourceID,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ID]),'')  ID,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ActivityID]),'') ActivityID ,
	isnull((select code from  SP_ScheduleResource where ID = ScheduleResourceId),'') Schedule_Resource_Code ,
	isnull([Name],'') Name,
	isnull(convert(varchar(10),[ScheduleOffset]),'') ScheduleOffset ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ScheduleDuration]),'') ScheduleDuration ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ROCID]),'') ROCID ,
	isnull([CostCode],'') CostCode ,
	isnull([UOM],'') UOM ,
	isnull(replace (replace (replace(replace (replace([Description] , char(10), ''),char(13),'') , ',', ''), '"',''),'“',''),'') AS Description,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[PeriodID]),'') PeriodID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ForemanID]),'') ForemanID,
	isnull(replace(replace(notes, CHAR(13),''), CHAR(10),''),'') as Notes,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[Priority]),'') Priority ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[PeriodPriority]),'') PeriodPriority ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[IssuedByID]),'') IssuedByID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[IssuedDate]),'') IssuedDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ExportedByID]),'') ExportedByID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[ExportedDate]),'') ExportedDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[CreatedByID]),'') CreatedByID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[CreatedDate]),'') CreatedDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ModifiedByID]),'') ModifiedByID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[ModifiedDate]),'') ModifiedDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ParentID]),'') ParentID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[DurationInDays]),'') DurationInDays ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[CWPStartDate]),'') CWPStartDate,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[CWPEndDate]),'') CWPEndDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[PrelimDurationInHours]),'') PrelimDurationInHours ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[DurationInWorkDays]),'') DurationInWorkDays ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[MatlPercAllocated]),'') MatlPercAllocated ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[RestartDate]),'') RestartDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[RemainingDuration]),'') RemainingDuration ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[ModifiedStartDate]),'') ModifiedStartDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ModifiedDuration]),'') ModifiedDuration ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[RestrictionID]),'') RestrictionID,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[RestrictionPercentage]),'') RestrictionPercentage ,
	isnull([RestrictionNotes],'') RestrictionNotes ,
	isnull([Text1],'') Text1 ,
	isnull([Text2],'') Text2 ,
	isnull([Text3],'') Text3 ,
	isnull([Text4],'') Text4 ,
	isnull([Text5],'') Text5 ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[ConstructionManagerID]),'') ConstructionManagerID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[SuperID]),'') SuperID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[GeneralForemanID]),'') GeneralForemanID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[FieldEngineerID]),'') FieldEngineerID ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[CoordinatorID]),'') CoordinatorID ,
	isnull([CompletedBy],'') CompletedBy ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(30),[CompletedDate]),'') CompletedDate ,
	isnull(convert(varchar(15),[IWPStatusID]),'')  IWPStatusID,
        (select StatusDescription from [dbo].[SP_IWPStatus] a where a.ID = [dbo].[SP_ConstructionWorkPack].IWPStatusID) IWP_Status,
       (select f.ProgressStatus from [dbo].[v_ConstructionWorkPack] f where f.Name = [dbo].[SP_ConstructionWorkPack].name) Progress_Status,
	(select ltrim(rtrim(LastName)) + ' ' + ltrim(rtrim(FirstName))  from [dbo].[TM_Employee] where ID = [SuperID]) Supervisor_Name   ,
	(select ltrim(rtrim(LastName)) + ' ' + ltrim(rtrim(FirstName))  from [dbo].[TM_Employee] where ID = ConstructionManagerID) Construction_Manager_Name   ,
	(select ltrim(rtrim(LastName)) + ' ' + ltrim(rtrim(FirstName))  from [dbo].[TM_Employee] where ID = [GeneralForemanID]) Foreman_Name ,
	(select ltrim(rtrim(LastName)) + ' ' + ltrim(rtrim(FirstName))  from [dbo].[TM_Employee] where ID = [FieldEngineerID]) Field_Engineer_Name ,
	(select ltrim(rtrim(LastName)) + ' ' + ltrim(rtrim(FirstName))  from [dbo].[TM_Employee] where ID = [CoordinatorID]) Coordinator_Name 
	from [dbo].[SP_ConstructionWorkPack]
